pi_items.source: Verified each Firefox preference individually against Mozilla source code (StaticPrefList.yaml) and task instructions (e.g., 2 means 'Always' for document_color_use, 0 means disabled for use_document_fonts).
Task instruction explicitly requires navigating to 'https://check.torproject.org/' and the export_result.sh queries this exact substring in the sqlite history database.

privileged_info_summary: The required Tor Browser preferences correspond directly to standard Firefox accessibility settings. The preference values were verified against Mozilla documentation and source code: font.minimum-size.x-western (18), browser.display.document_color_use (2 for 'Always'), browser.display.foreground_color ('#ffffff'), browser.display.background_color ('#000000'), browser.anchor_color ('#ffff00'), browser.display.use_document_fonts (0 for disabled), and accessibility.browsewithcaret (true). The test URL 'check.torproject.org' is confirmed from the instructions and the validation scripts query.
